title: Voices Of Wynn
description: The largest Minecraft voice acting project ever created. This adds voices to most quest npcs for the MMORPG server Wynncraft.
body:
Do you want a more immersive Wynncraft experience? Are you tired of having to read dialogue while doing quests? Then Voices of Wynn is the mod for you! With hundreds of volunteers having worked for years it now adds voice acting to almost all 130+ quests in Wynncraft!

[![Image](https://mythicmanor.com/wp-content/uploads/Mythic-Manor-Discord-Wide-Button.png)](https://discord.gg/voices-of-wynn-814401551292563477)
     [![Patreon](https://mythicmanor.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/Mythic-Manor-Patreon-Button.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Voices_Of_Wynn)


Here is a showcase of some of the voice acting this mod has:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/7dAte6W6Eps" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
